Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IAbstractEventGuardList

All Superinterfaces:
IPOGState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventGuardList
public interface IAbstractEventGuardList extends IPOGState
This class provides information on the guards of all abstract event (being refined by some concrete event). In case of a merge refinement there is more than one abstract event.

The information for each event is provided by class IAbstractEventGuardTable.

Since:
1.0

    Fields

    Field
    Description
    static final int
    INTRO
    A new event is introduced, i.e.
    static final int
    MERGE
    Several abstract events are merged into one event, i.e.

    SPLIT
    An abstraction is refined by at least one event, i.e.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<IAbstractEventGuardTable>
    getAbstractEventGuardTables()
    Returns the list of abstract event guard tables
    List<ISCEvent>
    getAbstractEvents()
    Returns the list of SC abstract events corresponding to the guards
    ISCEvent
    getFirstAbstractEvent()
    Returns the first abstract event from the list corresponding to the guards, or null if the list is empty.
    IAbstractEventGuardTable
    getFirstAbstractEventGuardTable()
    Returns the first abstract event guard table from the list corresponding to the guards, or null if the list is empty.
    int
    getRefinementType()
    Returns the type of refinement of the current event, one of INTRO, MERGE, SPLIT.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IState

  • Field Details

    • STATE_TYPE

      static final IStateType<IAbstractEventGuardList> STATE_TYPE

    • INTRO

      static final int INTRO
      A new event is introduced, i.e. there is no abstraction.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MERGE

      static final int MERGE
      Several abstract events are merged into one event, i.e. there are several abstractions (more than one).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SPLIT

      static final int SPLIT
      An abstraction is refined by at least one event, i.e. there is exacly one abstraction.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
